item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Meski demikian, kita juga menyadari bahwa hak dasar manusia harus dijaga agar tidak terabaikan sepenuhnya.

notes: Agent A begins clearly society-first and remains moderately supportive, but visibly softens into rights-protective caveats by turn 3 and turn 5. Agent B remains rights-first throughout, with only a small final concession that balancing public interest and individual rights is complex. Agent A turn 5 includes a non-Latin script artifact: "masyarakat整体".
